code:
--- title: Sequence Diagram - Mobile Repository Initialization (Logistics_StockLevel) config: theme: base --- %% QuantumZero UML palette note: actors/external=#fff7e6/#b45309, system/component=#e0f2fe/#075985, datastore=#ecfccb/#4d7c0f, notes=#fff9c4/#d97706. Aligns diagrams to Deliverable 1 UML/DFD theme. %% Related: diagrams/class-mobile-repositories.mmd (Logistics_FleetManagement), diagrams/class-mobile-services.mmd (Logistics_TrackingNumber) sequenceDiagram autonumber participant App as QuantumZero Mobile App participant Storage as SecureStorageService participant DidRepo as DidRepository participant CredRepo as CredentialRepository participant DB as Local SQLite (Logistics_StockLevel) App->>Storage: initialize(Logistics_DeliveryRoute) activate Storage Storage-->>App: ok deactivate Storage App->>DidRepo: initialize(Logistics_DeliveryRoute) activate DidRepo DidRepo->>DB: Open DB
ensure dids table activate DB DB-->>DidRepo: ok deactivate DB DidRepo-->>App: ok deactivate DidRepo App->>CredRepo: initialize(Logistics_DeliveryRoute) activate CredRepo CredRepo->>DB: Open DB
ensure credentials table activate DB DB-->>CredRepo: ok deactivate DB CredRepo-->>App: ok deactivate CredRepo
repo_description: The QuantumZero repository hosts the project’s public-facing static website, delivered through Static Pages. This site provides high-level information about the platform, including architectural overv

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要画一个序列图，描述QuantumZero Mobile App启动时如何初始化本地仓库。核心场景是物流库存模块Logistics_StockLevel的初始化流程。
明白。这个初始化涉及哪些具体组件？我看到有SecureStorageService、DidRepository和CredentialRepository，它们和App的交互顺序是怎样的？
顺序是：App先调用SecureStorageService的initialize，传入Logistics_DeliveryRoute参数；然后是DidRepository，最后是CredentialRepository。后两个都需要操作Local SQLite。
好的，我先画出App到SecureStorageService的初始化调用，包含激活和返回确认。
对的，Storage返回ok后就结束了。接下来是DidRepository的部分，它需要确保dids表存在。
我加上DidRepository的初始化流程，它会向Local SQLite发起Open DB并确保dids表，然后返回ok给App。
等等，DB的标注应该是"Open DB<br/ensure dids table"，用换行分开，不是连在一起。
已修正，加上了<br/换行。现在继续画CredentialRepository的部分，它和DidRepository类似，但是操作credentials表。
没错，CredentialRepository同样调用initialize(Logistics_DeliveryRoute)，然后确保credentials表存在。两个仓库共用同一个Local SQLite实例。
完成。整个流程是：App→Storage→App→DidRepo→DB→DidRepo→App→CredRepo→DB→CredRepo→App。所有激活和返回都画好了。
标题需要体现这是Logistics_StockLevel相关的初始化。另外，这个图要和Deliverable 1的UML/DFD主题保持一致，用QuantumZero的配色方案。
已设置标题为"Sequence Diagram - Mobile Repository Initialization (Logistics_StockLevel)"，并配置了theme为base，应用QuantumZero调色板：外部组件用#fff7e6/#b45309，系统组件用#e0f2fe/#075985，数据存储用#ecfccb/#4d7c0f。
还需要在注释里注明相关文档的关联关系，比如和Logistics_FleetManagement、Logistics_TrackingNumber的类图有关联。
已添加注释，注明Related: diagrams/class-mobile-repositories.mmd (Logistics_FleetManagement) 和 diagrams/class-mobile-services.mmd (Logistics_TrackingNumber)。
participant的别名也检查一下，App显示为QuantumZero Mobile App，Storage是SecureStorageService，DidRepo是DidRepository，CredRepo是CredentialRepository，DB是Local SQLite (Logistics_StockLevel)。
全部确认无误。别名设置正确，autonumber已启用，所有消息流向和激活条都符合时序。最终图已和Logistics_DeliveryRoute的业务场景对齐。
很好，这个序列图完整描述了移动应用在物流场景下的仓库初始化流程，可以直接用于技术文档。
